title: S33R Trans-Parent Fire
description: This resource pack was primarily made to make it easier to see through fire when Netherite blast mining, however it also retextures fire-related items to match the color palette.
body:
Trans' your fire, what will you do.  

This pack does not require optifine. The two pack versions are for Vanilla and the Mizunos 16 pack respectively.  I spontaneously made this pack because I was netherite mining and it was a pain trying to see through the fires I was too lazy to put out, and then I was like "oh hah funny trans pun", and then it spiraled out of control from there.  

This pack mostly serves to make it slightly easier to see things behind and under fire, as well as making being lit on fire much less visually obtrusive. And of course it also makes anything fire related the trans color, which is always a plus :D  

~ Seer  

![Empyr3 Banner](https://64.media.tumblr.com/c6a3c82db08f552caea6fbc335408cd2/dc0014a2e7c8630e-c1/s2048x3072/bfd1ffa937d23bbd937521255b701c2d4066dcea.pnj)
